nodes.label: sanad-deepwork.png
nodes.summary: Screenshot of the Sanad app Dashboard view showing an operational hub for Saudi legal and SME professionals. Displays greeting with dual Gregorian/Hijri calendar, priority alert cards (overdue tasks, expiring compliance, urgent cases), stat widgets (active cases, open tasks, billable time in SAR, focus timer), Today's priorities task list, Expiring compliance list with countdown timers, and a Daily Brief panel with MoJ/MHRSD/ZATCA regulatory news. Navigation sidebar includes Dashboard, Compliance (badge:4), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (badge:9), Documents. Footer notes PWA install capability and local timer/UI state caching.

properties.local_caching: Timer and UI state cached locally

nodes.label: DashboardView
nodes.summary: Central operational dashboard showing priority alerts, KPI widgets, today's task priorities, expiring compliance items, and a regulatory daily brief. Acts as the home screen for daily legal operations.

nodes.label: DashboardView.tsx
nodes.summary: React component implementing the Sanad Dashboard view as seen in the screenshot.

nodes.label: Compliance Expiry Tracking
nodes.summary: Feature showing upcoming compliance deadlines per entity/person with countdown (days left) and category tags such as GOSI, Commercial Reg., Iqama, Tax. Visible items: Sanad Legal LLC GOSI Filing (7d), Gulf Tech SME Commercial Registration (8d), Mohammed Saeed Iqama Renewal (18d), Sanad Legal LLC VAT Return Q2 (28d).

nodes.label: Focus Timer
nodes.summary: Productivity timer feature integrated in the dashboard. Shows 'Focus today: 45m 00s' widget and 'Start focus' CTA button. Timer state is cached locally to minimize server load.

nodes.label: Billable Time Tracking
nodes.summary: Dashboard widget showing billable time logged today (1h 30m) and the corresponding monetary value (1,275 SAR). Integrates time tracking with legal billing in Saudi Riyals.

nodes.label: Daily Brief Panel
nodes.summary: Regulatory news digest panel on the dashboard showing updates from MoJ (Ministry of Justice), MHRSD, and ZATCA. Displays tagged news items with dates and 'Read more' links. Example: MoJ E-Litigation Portal v3 launch, MHRSD Remote Work Policy update.

properties.purpose: Keep legal professionals informed of regulatory changes affecting their clients

nodes.label: PWA Feature
nodes.summary: Progressive Web App capability of Sanad. Sidebar note prompts users to install to desktop for daily access. Footer confirms 'Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'. Local caching of timer and UI state reduces server load.

properties.install_prompt: PWA-enabled. Install to desktop for daily access.

nodes.label: Navigation Sidebar
nodes.summary: Left navigation sidebar with items: Dashboard (active), Compliance (badge:4), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (badge:9), Documents. Badges indicate pending action counts. Sidebar also shows PWA install note and local caching note.

nodes.label: DeepWorkView.tsx
nodes.summary: React component for the Deep Work view, accessible from the sidebar navigation.

nodes.label: CasesView.tsx
nodes.summary: React component for Case Board view, accessible from navigation sidebar.
